mapper.insert: insert into BSC_BONDGUARANTOR (VC_SCODE, VC_BOND_CODE, L_MARKET, L_PUBLISH_DATE, VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_GUARANTOR_NAME, L_GUARANTOR_TYPE, VC_RULES, VC_GUARANTEE_LETTER, VC_CLAIM_CONDITION, VC_GUARANTEE_BENEFICIARY, EN_GUARANTEE_FEE, VC_GUARANTEE_CONTRACT, VC_BOND_ISSUER_ZX, VC_BOND_PAY_METHOD, EN_GUARANT_RATE, D_UPDATETIME, L_GUARANT_KIND, L_GUARANTEE_KIND, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_END_DATE, VC_GUARANTOR_INTRODUCTION, VC_GUARANTOR_SCOPE_OBJECT, ETL_TIME) values (#{vcScode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBondCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lMarket,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lPublishDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcCompanyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcGuarantorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lGuarantorType,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcRules,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcGuaranteeLetter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcClaimCondition,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcGuaranteeBeneficiary,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enGuaranteeFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcGuaranteeContract,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBondIssuerZx,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcBondPayMethod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enGuarantRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lGuarantKind,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lGuaranteeKind,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lBeginDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEndDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcGuarantorIntroduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcGuarantorScopeObject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select: select VC_SCODE, VC_BOND_CODE, L_MARKET, L_PUBLISH_DATE, VC_COMPANY_CODE, VC_GUARANTOR_NAME, L_GUARANTOR_TYPE, VC_RULES, VC_GUARANTEE_LETTER, VC_CLAIM_CONDITION, VC_GUARANTEE_BENEFICIARY, EN_GUARANTEE_FEE, VC_GUARANTEE_CONTRACT, VC_BOND_ISSUER_ZX, VC_BOND_PAY_METHOD, EN_GUARANT_RATE, D_UPDATETIME, L_GUARANT_KIND, L_GUARANTEE_KIND, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_END_DATE, VC_GUARANTOR_INTRODUCTION, VC_GUARANTOR_SCOPE_OBJECT, ETL_TIME from BSC_BONDGUARANTOR
